## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX.AI's content marketing services and Regie's current marketing challenges and future plans.](https://fathom.video/share/HxCNCwoG9Dd77-24qxyzshrMpNMuHQxS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Regie is in early marketing stages, spending \~$10k/month on LinkedIn ads, sourcing 60% of booked revenue from marketing](https://fathom.video/share/HxCNCwoG9Dd77-24qxyzshrMpNMuHQxS?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [GrowthX.AI offers comprehensive content strategy and production services, starting at $20k for 8-week strategy sprint, then $12k+ monthly retainer](https://fathom.video/share/HxCNCwoG9Dd77-24qxyzshrMpNMuHQxS?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Regie plans to ramp up marketing efforts in 1-2 quarters, focusing on product improvements before going "all in" on marketing](https://fathom.video/share/HxCNCwoG9Dd77-24qxyzshrMpNMuHQxS?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)

## Topics

### Regie's Current Marketing Efforts

  - [Small team: Katie + 3 (product marketing, content/SEO, demand gen)](https://fathom.video/share/HxCNCwoG9Dd77-24qxyzshrMpNMuHQxS?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [$10k/month on LinkedIn ads driving engagement/impressions, not leads](https://fathom.video/share/HxCNCwoG9Dd77-24qxyzshrMpNMuHQxS?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [60% of booked revenue from marketing-sourced leads](https://fathom.video/share/HxCNCwoG9Dd77-24qxyzshrMpNMuHQxS?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Challenges: crowded AI prospecting tool space, brand awareness, differentiation](https://fathom.video/share/HxCNCwoG9Dd77-24qxyzshrMpNMuHQxS?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Top performers: Clay (Claygent program, agency advocates), Common Room, Nooks (dialer competitor)](https://fathom.video/share/HxCNCwoG9Dd77-24qxyzshrMpNMuHQxS?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Regie's uniqueness: platform stands out in demos, but awareness lacking](https://fathom.video/share/HxCNCwoG9Dd77-24qxyzshrMpNMuHQxS?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Domain authority gap: Nooks \~30x higher than Regie, with fewer pages (100 vs 147)](https://fathom.video/share/HxCNCwoG9Dd77-24qxyzshrMpNMuHQxS?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)

### GrowthX.AI's Content Marketing Approach

  - [Comprehensive strategy: Kickoff, research, artifact creation (personas, messaging)](https://fathom.video/share/HxCNCwoG9Dd77-24qxyzshrMpNMuHQxS?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Content OS: Analyze 50k+ keywords, identify 2k+ content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/HxCNCwoG9Dd77-24qxyzshrMpNMuHQxS?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Production pipeline: Brief creation, research, drafting, fact-checking, editing](https://fathom.video/share/HxCNCwoG9Dd77-24qxyzshrMpNMuHQxS?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [AI-assisted: Automated illustrations, cover images, cross-linking](https://fathom.video/share/HxCNCwoG9Dd77-24qxyzshrMpNMuHQxS?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
  - [Volume: Minimum daily publishing, scaling up to 50+ pieces/week for larger sites](https://fathom.video/share/HxCNCwoG9Dd77-24qxyzshrMpNMuHQxS?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)

### GrowthX.AI's Offering Details

  - [Strategy sprint: $20k for 8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/HxCNCwoG9Dd77-24qxyzshrMpNMuHQxS?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)
  - [Ongoing retainer: Starting at $12k/month](https://fathom.video/share/HxCNCwoG9Dd77-24qxyzshrMpNMuHQxS?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
  - Output: \~100,000 words/month published at \<$0.10/word
  - [Full-stack solution: Strategy, content, SEO, graphics, editing, web updates](https://fathom.video/share/HxCNCwoG9Dd77-24qxyzshrMpNMuHQxS?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)

### Content Types and Examples

  - [Blog articles, use case pages, directories, newsletters](https://fathom.video/share/HxCNCwoG9Dd77-24qxyzshrMpNMuHQxS?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [Thought leadership pieces (e.g., women's healthcare with doctor review)](https://fathom.video/share/HxCNCwoG9Dd77-24qxyzshrMpNMuHQxS?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
  - [Integration pages, expense category pages, per diem information](https://fathom.video/share/HxCNCwoG9Dd77-24qxyzshrMpNMuHQxS?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Katie to reassess marketing readiness in about 3 weeks (\~4 weeks from meeting date)](https://fathom.video/share/HxCNCwoG9Dd77-24qxyzshrMpNMuHQxS?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [Marcel to continue inviting Katie to GrowthX events](https://fathom.video/share/HxCNCwoG9Dd77-24qxyzshrMpNMuHQxS?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [Consider breakfast meetups for easier networking opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/HxCNCwoG9Dd77-24qxyzshrMpNMuHQxS?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
